Step.label: sPrompt
Step.notes: GetHead(lsValueList) & "\\Customers\\" & Test(GetCount(lsPrompt) > 3, GetAt(lsPrompt, GetCount(lsPrompt) - 4) & "\\", "") & Test(GetCount(lsPrompt) > 2, GetAt(lsPrompt, GetCount(lsPrompt) - 3) & "\\", sPromptSource & Test(StrLen(sPromptSource) > 0, "\\", "")) & Test(GetCount(lsPrompt) > 1, GetAt(lsPrompt, GetCount(lsPrompt) - 2) & "\\", sLanguage & Test(StrLen(sLanguage) > 0, "\\", "")) & SubstStr(GetTail(lsPrompt), ".wav", "") & ".wav"

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: GetHead(lsValueList) & "\\Customers\\" & Test(GetCount(lsPrompt) > 3, GetAt(lsPrompt, GetCount(lsPrompt) - 4) & "\\", "") & Test(GetCount(lsPrompt) > 2, GetAt(lsPrompt, GetCount(lsPrompt) - 3) & "\\", sPromptLibrary & Test(StrLen(sPromptLibrary) > 0, "\\", "")) & Test(GetCount(lsPrompt) > 1, GetAt(lsPrompt, GetCount(lsPrompt) - 2) & "\\", sLanguage & Test(StrLen(sLanguage) > 0, "\\", "")) & SubstStr(GetTail(lsPrompt), ".wav", "") & ".wav"

Parameter.label: Permissible deviation in Tone Detection Frequency 1 (Hz)
Permissible deviation in Tone Detection Frequency 2 (Hz)
Attribute to monitor as a termination event
Suppress logging of the input digits.
Interaction ID for the attribute monitor
Repeat queued plays if audio interruption is encountered?

Step.label: Invalid File
Step.notes: "Single prompt does not exists. Prompt: " & sPrompt

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Single prompt does not exists. Prompt: " & sPrompt

Step.label: sResourcePath
Step.notes:
Original
GetHead(lsValueList) & "\\Customers\\" & sPromptLibrary & Test(StrLen(sPromptLibrary) > 0, "\\", "") & sLanguage & "\\"
Works without Localization Bundle
GetHead(lsValueList) & "\\Customers\\" & sPromptSource & Test(StrLen(sPromptSource) > 0, "\\", "") & sLanguage & "\\"
Works With Localization Bundle (Currently in Use)
GetHead(lsValueList) & "\\Customers\\" & sPromptSource & Test(StrLen(sPromptSource) > 0, "\\", "") & c_sTag & sLanguage & "\\"
